title: Anguina patara
taxonomy: Anguina tritici or Anguina graminea is the closest relatives of Anguina patara. Anguina patara is classified as a species of nematode worm belonging to the family Anguinidae. This plant parasitic nematode is commonly found in grasses and is known to cause significant damage to plants. Anguina patara is a type of wireworm, specifically a plant parasitic nematode. The classification of Anguina patara is further divided into several orders and classes within the kingdom Animalia.
